fields.description: The full JSON key of the Google Cloud service account used for ALL Drive automation (project folders, customer folders, call-recording exports). The account's client_email must be added as a Content Manager on the Shared Drive(s) below.
fields.label: Service Account JSON

fields.description: The Shared Drive that holds the per-customer folders and the project folder trees (the ID is the part of the Shared Drive's URL after /folders/ or /drive/).
fields.label: Shared Drive ID

fields.description: Create a top-level Drive folder (named after the customer) in the Shared Drive whenever a Customer is created. Project provisioning reuses the same folder, and its ID is stored on the Customer record.
fields.label: Create Customer Folders on Customer Creation

fields.description: Google Drive folder ID that receives every call recording and Twilio voicemail, organised into monthly YYYY_MM subfolders (e.g. the Operations Share Drive folder). The service account above must be a member of the Shared Drive containing this folder. Leave empty to disable the export.
fields.label: Call Recordings Folder ID
